resources.string: Real time audio visualizer is active. Your phone is now dancing to the beat! No content is saved, and privacy is respected.

This app was made by Aleks Levet, rKyzen, and Oliver lebaigue.

To synchronize the Glyph Interface with your music, this app captures device audio. We use Media Projection for high-fidelity visualization.

Privacy Note: We only utilize the audio stream. No screen content is recorded.
Warning: this source uses the standard Android visualizer-style audio stream. It is low fidelity and may suck.
Latency compensation ensures Glyphs hit exactly on the beat, especially useful for Bluetooth devices.
A higher gamma value gives a more punchy look, but with less subtle details and overall brightness. A lower one is brighter but less punchy.
Toggle between NDot and NType fonts app-wide.
Vibrates on detected beats within the selected frequency range. Smoother but sometimes not as stable. It\'s a beta feature.
Vibrates based on audio amplitude in this range.
The Hz range that the flashlight will react to. Lower for bass, higher for snare/vocals.
Higher threshold filters out background noise/drums.
Higher smoothing makes the light pulse softly instead of strobing.
Enable advanced testing and device spoofing features.
Forces the app to behave as if it\'s running on the selected device.
Glyphs pulse subtly when the visualizer is active but no audio is playing.
Flashes all Glyphs briefly when a new notification arrives while the visualizer is running.
Completely turn off Glyphs and release the session when no audio is detected.
No configuration loaded. Please check for updates in Settings to download the latest visualizer presets.
Glyph features need the Nothing glyph debug interface enabled through ADB on this device.
Glyph features need Developer options enabled first on Nothing Phone (1) running Android 15. After that, run this ADB command:
adb shell settings put global nt_glyph_interface_debug_enable 1
Run the command once from a computer with ADB, then reopen the app if the Glyphs still do not respond.
WE NEED A DAMN PROPER ABOUT SCREEN!! In the meantime please check GitHub for info.
Better Nothing Music Visualizer unlocks the full potential of the Glyph Interface with high-fidelity, real-time frequency analysis.
Why are we better than Nothing\'s implementation:
• 60 FPS fluid animations vs ~25 FPS stock
• Precise FFT sync vs semi-random response
MediaProjection is used only to power the real-time visualizer. No unnecessary recording or data storage is performed.
Developer working on a music app with integration
Discord bot for testing the script (deprecated)
Music theme requires Notification Access. Please enable it for this app.
Please enter the developer password to enable advanced features and device spoofing.
Share your preset with other users.
Apply settings to all selected segments
No presets found. Be the first to share one!
Notify all users about updates or news
Reduces Glyph brightness when battery is below this level to save power.
A new version is available. What\'s new:

This permission lets the app access the device audio stream through Android\'s capture system so the Glyph visualizer can react in real time. No unnecessary recordings are stored, and the app does not save your media or private data.
Shizuku permission is required for this source
Shizuku not running or not installed
Notifications are required while the visualizer is active
Please enable notification access for this feature
thanks for participating to the community

This License Agreement (\"Agreement\") is a legal agreement between you (\"Licensee\") and Oliver Lebaigue (\"Licensor\") for the use, review, and modification of the music visualizer software application known as \"better-nothing-music-visualizer\" (the \"Software\"), a project founded by Aleks Levet under the organization Luminus Labs.

The Software\'s source code is hosted publicly at https://github.com/aleks-levet/better-nothing-music-visualizer. By accessing, downloading, copying, or otherwise using the Software or its Source Code, Licensee agrees to be bound by the terms of this Agreement.

2.1 \"Software\" shall mean the better-nothing-music-visualizer software application, including but not limited to the source code, audio processing modules, rendering engines, visual assets, graphics libraries, configuration scripts, documentation, object files, binary executables, and any associated media or assets.
2.2 \"Source Code\" shall mean the publicly disclosed files of the Software, including all script files, shader code, assets, and build configurations.

Licensor acknowledges that the Source Code is public. Licensee is granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to download, view, and modify the Source Code for personal, educational, and non-commercial evaluation purposes only.
* (a) Redistribute the Software or modified versions of it to third parties, except via standard repository forks on GitHub, provided those forks remain bound by this exact License.
* (b) Use the Software or any derivative works for commercial purposes, public performances, commercial streaming, or any revenue-generating activities without separate written authorization.
* (c) Remove, alter, or obscure any copyright, trademark, patent, or proprietary rights notices placed on or within the Software, including references to Aleks Levet, Luminus Labs, or Licensor.
* (d) Use the Software to develop any competing commercial music visualization software or platform.

Licensor, Aleks Levet, and Luminus Labs retain all respective right, title, and interest in and to the Software, including all intellectual property rights therein. Public disclosure of the Source Code does not constitute a waiver of copyright or ownership.

THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED \"AS IS\" AND \"WITH ALL FAULTS.\" TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, LICENSOR DISCLAIMS ALL OTHER WARRANTIES AND CONDITIONS, EITHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR STATUTORY, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, ANY IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
Licensor, Aleks Levet, and Luminus Labs are under no obligation to provide technical support, updates, upgrades, or modifications to the Software.

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL LICENSOR, ALEKS LEVET, OR LUMINUS LABS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES WHATSOEVER (INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, LOSS OF PROFITS, BUSINESS INTERRUPTION, OR ANY OTHER PECUNIARY LOSS) ARISING OUT OF THE USE OF OR INABILITY TO USE THE SOFTWARE, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

Licensee\'s rights under this Agreement will terminate automatically without notice from Licensor if Licensee fails to comply with any term(s) of this Agreement. Upon termination, Licensee shall cease all use and destroy all local copies of the Software.
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Oliver Lebaigue resides, without regard to its conflict of law principles.
